metoffice.title: Yellow warning of rain affecting South West England
metoffice.summary: Yellow warning of rain affecting South West England: Bath and North East Somerset, Bristol, Devon, Dorset, Gloucestershire, North Somerset, Somerset, South Gloucestershire, Swindon, Wiltshire valid from 0600 Fri 14 Nov to 0600 Sat 15 Nov

heat.text: Little impact observed on health, healthcare services and social care provision. Business as usual.

cold.text:
Minor impacts are possible across health and social services, including:

  • increased use of healthcare services by vulnerable people
  • greater risk to life of vulnerable people

But not expected.
